b:T1299,<div class="question">
<p>Two cylinders, X and Y, made from the same material, are connected in series.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64," style="display:block;margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto;"/></p>
<p>The cross-sectional area of Y is twice that of X. The drift speed of the electrons in X is <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><msub><mi>v</mi><mtext>X</mtext></msub></math> and in Y it is <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><msub><mi>v</mi><mtext>Y</mtext></msub></math>.</p>
<p>What is the ratio <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><msub><mi>v</mi><mtext>X</mtext></msub><msub><mi>v</mi><mtext>Y</mtext></msub></mfrac></math>?</p>
<p>A.  4</p>
<p>B.  2</p>
<p>C.  1</p>
<p>D.  <math xmlns="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"><mfrac><mn>1</mn><mn>2</mn></mfrac></math></p>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/physics/topic/5/","children":["← back to ","Physics"," topic ","5"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"22M.1.SL.TZ1.22"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Physics"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","1"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"22M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","5-1-electric-fields"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>B</p>\n</div>"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\">\n<p>Responses from SL candidates were split between options B and D. Candidates appeared to recognize the factor of two in the drift speed ratio, but were unclear as to whether it was 2:1 or 1:2. Candidates are encouraged to think if their answer makes sense given the context of the question; it is likely that common sense would help candidates in this instance. Practice manipulating ratios to compare changing variables is a useful skill, and this question could be put to good use in this regard.</p>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
